other_observers: Reported first by Ed Landi after noon on June 1st, it sounds like a local photographer saw it the day before.  I saw the bird with Mark Yaeger. Pearle Sandstrom-Smith, Clif Smith, John Drummond, and others.
duration: Over an hour off and on with other birders
description: I was heading home, from Pueblo to Pueblo West, I was on Goodnight Ave, not far from Pueblo City Park, when I heard that Ed Landi found an aduly Yellow-crowned Night-Heron at Pueblo City Park.  I was able to turn around and go see it along the shore.  I helped other birders see it for a while.  Adult night-heron with yellow crown, clearly not a Black-crowned Night-Heron.  See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
